sentiment.reasoning: Routine patent filings are standard business activities that do not provide immediate material financial benefit.

sentiment.reasoning: A 20% revenue miss is a substantial negative indicator that directly impacts investor sentiment and valuation.

scoring.methodology: Gemini scores only the effect implied by the headline text itself, then separates immediate reaction versus later carry-through within the same 100-day session.
